title: Jmin Survival Academy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Jmin Survival Academy''' was a paramilitary institution operating during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

It was founded by [[Lunkar An]], a graduate student from prestigious [[Summit Class]] at [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]]. An graduated with a new record around [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]] and he decided to create his own school.

Seven years after An's graduation, a new class broke his record. An decided to go back to GOSS as a student, wishing to "redeem" himself.
